data.name: SystemTab_ServerAnnouncementsDropdownHeader
data.value: Server announcements

data.name: SystemTab_ServerAnnouncementsHelpMarker
data.value:
How to handle the server message block shown on login or world travel (welcome headers, in-game event promos, congestion notices, phishing warning).
Show all โ unchanged. Hide all โ suppress the whole block. Condensed โ keep only the "Welcome to <world>!" line. Login only โ full block on login, nothing on world-hops. Login full, condensed on world-hop โ full block on login, only the welcome line on world-hops. Hide phishing warning only โ keeps greeting and event text, removes the phishing/congestion warning and its URL.
Uses localized matching for all supported client languages (EN/DE/FR/JP).
